attack_pattern.description: First Power Shield → Dampen → Ram → Prep → Magic Bomb → repeat
Charge → Flamethrower → Windup → Heavy Cleave → repeat
then conditional: Flail (if in first slot) / Bite (if in second slot) / Lash (if in third slot) / Enlarge (if in fourth slot)
Smash → Zoom → Inertia → Piercing Stabs → repeat
Starts with Soul Burn; then random: Soul Burn (no repeat), Maelstrom (no repeat), Drain Life (no repeat)
